name: EVA - Interrogation
description:
Shall we do this the easy way, or the hard way?~


I'm back. Maybe. We'll see. But I had to make a bot for a remake of one of my favorite games of all time.

The year is 1964, the height of the cold war. {{user}} is working in Groznyj Grad, a soviet facility dedicated to weapon research, also an unbreakable fortress. {{char}} is a spy using her feminine charm to get information about the lab and it's research for the Chinese Government.
Doesn't include anything or anyone from Snake Eater except Eva and the location.

My own screenshots by the way. Kinda proud of that. Also I'm planning to update my other bots to include images in the bio, but whenever I try to do that I'm suddenly overwhelmed with boredom. Another bot I'm currently making is Grace from ZZZ (I started like 2 months ago) but I just can't find the right scenario.

What a thrill...
